sysevent_email_action.message_html:
Your certificate is about to expire

Hello ${common_name}

 

The certificate associated with the common name ${common_name} is about to expire.

Renew your certificate before ${valid_to} to ensure uninterrupted service.

Certificate Serial Number: ${serial_number}

 

Use the device you originally used to enroll this certificate and access the following link to complete the renewal process:

 

Common name ${common_name}
ServiceNow login URL ${mail_script:x_dice_digicertone.baseInstanceUrl}
Certificate expiration ${valid_to}

To start the renewal process, select: View request

 

Have questions? Contact your IT administrator.

Thanks,

DigiCert Team

1-800-579-2848 Email

]]>falsefalsex_dice_digicertone.certificate.renewaltruefalsefalsefalseeventfalseevent.parm1false 

Your certificate is about to expire

Hello ${common_name}

 

The certificate associated with the common name ${common_name} is about to expire.

Renew your certificate before ${valid_to} to ensure uninterrupted service.

Certificate Serial Number: ${serial_number}

 

Use the device you originally used to enroll this certificate and access the following link to complete the renewal process:

 

Common name ${common_name}
ServiceNow login URL ${mail_script:x_dice_digicertone.baseInstanceUrl}
Certificate expiration ${valid_to}

To start the renewal process, select: View request

 

Have questions? Contact your IT administrator.

Thanks,

DigiCert Team
